name: code-executor-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Sovereign AI tools for everyone.

tools.name: execute_code
tools.description: Execute code in a sandboxed environment with safety checks.

tools.name: run_command
tools.description: Execute a shell command and return stdout/stderr/exit_code.

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Run a test suite and return results. Default: pytest.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read contents of a file (restricted to allowed directories: Desktop,

tools.name: list_sandbox_files
tools.description: List files in the sandbox working directory. All code execution

tools.name: get_safety_rules
tools.description: Get the current safety rules and blocked patterns for code execution.

tools.name: execute_code_docker
tools.description: Execute code inside a temporary Docker container for isolation.
